name: Shippo
shortDescription: Multi-carrier shipping integration for creating labels, comparing live rates across USPS, FedEx, UPS and DHL, tracking packages, handling international customs, scheduling pickups, and managing refunds and orders.

actions.name: Create Address
actions.description: Creates a new address record in your Shippo account. When validation is enabled Shippo immediately validates the address and returns the validation_results object alongside the saved address.

actions.name: List Addresses
actions.description: Lists previously created addresses with pagination. Use to retrieve saved senders and recipients.

actions.name: Get Address
actions.description: Retrieves a single address by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Validate Address
actions.description: Validates an existing address against carrier databases and returns validation_results indicating whether the address is deliverable.

actions.name: Create Parcel
actions.description: Creates a parcel describing the dimensions and weight of a package. Provide either explicit dimensions or a Shippo predefined package template token.

actions.name: List Parcels
actions.description: Lists previously created parcels with pagination.

actions.name: Get Parcel
actions.description: Retrieves a single parcel by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Shipment
actions.description: Creates a shipment from existing addresses and parcels (or inline address/parcel objects) and triggers Shippo to fetch live rates from your connected carriers. Pass async=true to defer rate fetching for large shipments.

actions.name: List Shipments
actions.description: Lists previously created shipments with pagination.

actions.name: Get Shipment
actions.description: Retrieves a single shipment by its Shippo object identifier including all rates calculated for it.

actions.name: Get Shipment Rates
actions.description: Returns the rates for a shipment, optionally converted to a different currency.

actions.name: Get Rate
actions.description: Retrieves a single rate by its Shippo object identifier. Use to inspect the rate metadata before purchasing a label.

actions.name: Create Transaction (Buy Label)
actions.description: Purchases a shipping label from a previously calculated rate. Returns a transaction containing the label_url, tracking_number and tracking_url_provider when status is SUCCESS.

actions.name: List Transactions
actions.description: Lists transactions (purchased labels) with optional filters.

actions.name: Get Transaction
actions.description: Retrieves a single transaction (purchased label) by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Batch
actions.description: Creates a batch to buy shipping labels for many shipments at once. Shippo validates the batch asynchronously, so the response starts in status VALIDATING - poll Get Batch until it reaches VALID, then call Purchase Batch.

actions.name: Get Batch
actions.description: Retrieves a batch by its Shippo object_id. The object_results counts show validation and purchase progress and batch_shipments lists each shipment's status. Use it to poll an async batch until status is VALID (ready to purchase) or PURCHASED (labels ready in label_url).

actions.name: Purchase Batch
actions.description: Purchases every valid shipment in a batch, generating all the shipping labels in one call. The batch moves to status PURCHASING and then PURCHASED - poll Get Batch until label_url holds the combined label documents.

actions.name: Add Shipments to Batch
actions.description: Adds one or more shipments to an existing batch. Send the same shipment entries you would pass to Create Batch; Shippo validates them asynchronously and updates the batch's object_results counts.

actions.name: Remove Shipments from Batch
actions.description: Removes shipments from a batch by their batch-shipment object_ids. Each id is the object_id of an entry in the batch's batch_shipments list (from Get Batch), not the underlying shipment object_id. Returns the updated batch.

actions.name: Create Tracker
actions.description: Registers a tracker so Shippo begins polling the carrier and emitting tracking webhooks for the supplied carrier and tracking number.

actions.name: Get Tracking Status
actions.description: Retrieves the latest tracking status and history for a carrier + tracking number combination.

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Requests a refund for a purchased label transaction. Async refunds return immediately with status QUEUED.

actions.name: List Refunds
actions.description: Lists previously requested refunds with pagination.

actions.name: Get Refund
actions.description: Retrieves a single refund by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Manifest
actions.description: Creates a carrier end-of-day manifest covering one or more transactions. Required by some carriers (notably USPS) to scan and pick up the day's shipments.

actions.name: List Manifests
actions.description: Lists previously created manifests with pagination.

actions.name: Get Manifest
actions.description: Retrieves a single manifest by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Customs Item
actions.description: Creates a customs item describing a single line of an international customs declaration.

actions.name: List Customs Items
actions.description: Lists previously created customs items with pagination.

actions.name: Get Customs Item
actions.description: Retrieves a single customs item by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Customs Declaration
actions.description: Creates a customs declaration grouping previously created customs items into a complete document attachable to international shipments.

actions.name: List Customs Declarations
actions.description: Lists previously created customs declarations with pagination.

actions.name: Get Customs Declaration
actions.description: Retrieves a single customs declaration by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: List Carrier Accounts
actions.description: Lists carrier accounts connected to the authenticated Shippo account. In test mode this typically returns Shippo's default test accounts (USPS, FedEx, DHL Express).

actions.name: Get Carrier Account
actions.description: Retrieves a single carrier account by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Carrier Account
actions.description: Connects one of your own carrier accounts (USPS, FedEx, UPS, DHL and others) to Shippo so its negotiated rates and labels become available. Carrier login credentials go in the carrier-specific parameters object.

actions.name: Update Carrier Account
actions.description: Updates a connected carrier account - toggle it active or inactive, or refresh its carrier-specific credentials. The carrier and account_id together identify the account and cannot be changed.

actions.name: List Orders
actions.description: Lists Shippo orders with optional filters.

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single Shippo order by its object identifier.

actions.name: Create Order
actions.description: Creates a Shippo order from external e-commerce data so it can later be fulfilled and shipped.

actions.name: Create Pickup
actions.description: Schedules a carrier pickup for one or more transactions. Provide ISO 8601 timestamps for the requested pickup window and the carrier-specific location object.

actions.name: Get Pickup
actions.description: Retrieves a single pickup by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: List Service Groups
actions.description: Lists service groups configured on your Shippo account. Service groups bundle service levels for use on rate-at-checkout integrations.

actions.name: Create Service Group
actions.description: Creates a new service group bundling carrier service levels for live-rate, flat-rate or free-shipping checkout flows.

actions.name: Delete Service Group
actions.description: Deletes a service group by its Shippo object identifier. Returns the deleted service group identifier on success.

actions.name: List Webhooks
actions.description: Lists webhook subscriptions registered on the authenticated Shippo account.

actions.name: Get Webhook
actions.description: Retrieves a single webhook subscription by its Shippo object identifier.

actions.name: Create Webhook
actions.description: Registers a webhook so Shippo POSTs a notification to your URL whenever the chosen event happens (a tracking update, a label transaction, or a batch change). Pair it with your own endpoint or the On Tracking Status Updated trigger.

actions.name: Update Webhook
actions.description: Updates a registered webhook - change the destination URL, the event it listens for, or toggle it active. Shippo requires both URL and event on every update.

actions.name: Delete Webhook
actions.description: Deletes a registered webhook so Shippo stops sending it events.

idealUseCases: Generating shipping labels and tracking numbers from order data
Comparing live multi-carrier rates to pick cheapest or fastest service
Tracking shipments end-to-end with real-time status updates
Automating international shipments with customs declarations
Scheduling carrier pickups and producing end-of-day manifests
Issuing refunds for unused or void labels
Synchronizing e-commerce orders into a fulfillment workflow
agentIdeas: When Shippo "On Tracking Status Updated" reports DELIVERED, use Gmail "Send Message" to notify the customer with the delivery time and tracking link.
When a Shopify "On New Order" trigger fires, chain Shippo "Create Shipment" then "Create Transaction (Buy Label)" to produce a label per order.
When Shippo "On Tracking Status Updated" reports FAILURE or RETURNED, use Slack "Send Message To Channel" to alert the fulfillment channel.
